findings.title: request.ts:150 の executeNew 帰属が不正確
findings.rationale: 「src/core/command/request.ts:150 — executeNew 系は opts?.cwd ?? process.cwd() を基点に specrunner/drafts/ を作る」と記載されているが、executeNew は src/core/command/request-new.ts:18 に移動済みで cwd: string を直接引数として受け取る。request.ts:150 の opts?.cwd ?? process.cwd() は executeValidate 内の design-layer gate 設定解決コード。症状の根本原因（command-registry.ts:334 が process.cwd() を渡す）は正確で実装上の支障はない。

findings.title: resolveRepoRootOrFail の行番号が 1 行ずれ
findings.rationale: 「:24 に throw 版 resolveRepoRootOrFail もある」と記載されているが、実際の関数宣言は src/util/repo-root.ts:25。:24 は JSDoc コメント末尾行。内容・機能は正確で実装に影響なし。

observations.title: process.cwd() は src/ 全域で 65 箇所超 — allowlist seed の規模確認
observations.rationale: 要件 4 の ratchet allowlist seed 対象として src/ 全体で process.cwd() が 37 ファイル 65 箇所超存在することを実測で確認。スコープ外を allowlist に seed する作業量は見た目より大きい可能性があるが、request は漸進的転換（段階 request 分割）を明示しており設計上は問題ない。

toolResult.reason:
Wrote design.md, spec.md, and tasks.md under specrunner/changes/repo-root-entry-resolution/ on branch change/repo-root-entry-resolution-3cedb338.

Design summary: resolve repo root once at dispatch (bin/specrunner.ts) and inject a CommandContext { repoRoot, invokerCwd } into handlers; add a requiresRepo declaration on CommandDef with a unified out-of-repo error (repoRequiredError, exit 2). Convert the three symptom paths — request new (command-registry:334 → ctx.repoRoot, requiresRepo:true), job stats (:683 → ctx.repoRoot, requiresRepo:true), and doctor (DoctorContext gains optional repoRoot; 9 repo/storage checks derive base from ctx.repoRoot ?? ctx.cwd; doctor stays requiresRepo:false so it runs outside a repo). Preserve role (b) relative-path resolution (validate arg / --prompt-file) and worktree semantics (resolveRepoRoot returns enclosing worktree root, unchanged). Add a src/-wide process.cwd() allowlist ratchet (new CWD invariant in core-invariants.test.ts + arch-allowlist.ts seed of ~40 current occurrences classified permanent-legit vs debt), following the existing delete-only, CODEOWNERS-gated governance.

Tasks T-01..T-07 map to acceptance criteria T1–T7, each with acceptance criteria and mutation checks; tasks.md includes an enumerated allowlist seed appendix. Verified all cited file:line assertions against the current tree during design; used the existing main() dispatch test harness and runChecks/runJobStats/executeNew seams to keep the criteria testable without breaking existing unit tests.
